ModMetaData.name: RimSynapse - StoryTeller
ModMetaData.author: RimSynapse Team
ModMetaData.description:
[h1]RimSynapse - StoryTeller[/h1] [b]📚 [url=https://github.com/RimSynapse/RimSynapse-StoryTeller/wiki]Official Wiki & Documentation[/url][/b]
[b]DEPRECATED - DO NOT USE[/b] This module has been officially deprecated. Its features (Aura Algorithm and Faction Lore) have been migrated directly into [b]RimSynapse - Core[/b] and [b]RimSynapse - Factions[/b].
Please unsubscribe from this mod and use the updated Core and Factions modules instead.
